name: thespin
description: Show one sponsored line in the status bar while your AI agent works, and keep 50% of the revenue. Works in VS Code and Cursor.

walkthroughs.title: Earn from your status bar with thespin.ad
walkthroughs.description: Show one sponsored line while your AI agent works, and keep 50% of the revenue.

steps.title: The spinner is ad space now
steps.description:
thespin.ad shows a single sponsored line in your status bar while VS Code or Cursor works.

You keep **50%** of every impression and click it earns.

steps.title: Add your publisher key to earn
steps.description:
Without a key the line still shows — it just earns nothing. Paste your key from the [Payouts page](https://thespin.ad) to start your revenue share.

[Add your publisher key](command:thespin.setupKey)

steps.title: Watch it in the status bar
steps.description:
Look bottom-right: the $(megaphone) item is the live sponsored line. The current top bid is marked with a ★ and a highlighted background.

Click it to open the sponsor — that's a tracked click you earn on.

thespin.serverUrl.description: Base URL of the thespin.ad exchange.

thespin.publisherKey.markdownDescription: Your publisher key from the [Payouts page](https://thespin.ad). Set it to earn your revenue share for the lines you show.

thespin.pollSeconds.description: How often to refresh the sponsored line (seconds).
